references: Section 5 / P6 — Canary -> Promote -> Baru Evaluasi P1-D / Execution

required_reviewers.focus: secret handling, account-state isolation, fail-closed behavior
latency budgets, import-time regressions, queue/runtime overhead

acceptance: All three reviewer roles have recorded findings or explicit no-findings conclusions.
Any blocking finding is resolved or explicitly waived with rationale.
Review conclusions reference the verification artifacts for security and performance gates.
notes: Use this artifact as the canonical collection point for independent review conclusions.
Do not mark this gate passed until linked security and performance artifacts are also populated.
